# Resource (hush_elasticsearch_access_privilege)

Manage Elasticsearch access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an Elasticsearch access privilege with cluster and index permissions
resource "hush_elasticsearch_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "my-es-privilege"
  description = "Elasticsearch privilege with cluster and index access"

  grant {
    cluster = ["monitor", "manage_index_templates"]

    indices {
      names      = ["logs-*", "metrics-*"]
      privileges = ["read", "view_index_metadata"]
    }

    indices {
      names      = ["app-*"]
      privileges = ["all"]
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Elasticsearch access privilege
- `grant` (Block List, Max: 1) The grant configuration for the privilege (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--grant))

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Elasticsearch access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Elasticsearch access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedblock--grant"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grant`

Optional:

- `cluster` (List of String) List of cluster-level privileges (e.g., monitor, manage, all)
- `indices` (Block List) List of index privilege configurations (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--grant--indices))

<a id="nestedblock--grant--indices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grant.indices`

Required:

- `names` (List of String) List of index name patterns
- `privileges` (List of String) List of index-level privileges (e.g., read, write, all)
